title: 25x25 matrix framework (Warning labels populated, cell content NOT)
public_claim: This packet consolidates a 25-topic master framework for speechwriting, in which each topic is defined by a 25x25 grid: 25 analytical column-dimensions paired with 25 row-contexts or application formats.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
use_value: It treats expression as an instrument with audience, warrant, cadence, and rhetorical-risk controls rather than as decorative prose.
